---
title: "BIOL606 MIDTERM2 GallegosPerez Carter"
author: "Samantha Gallegos Perez, Sjana Carter"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
library(Hmisc)
library(readr)
library(ggfortify)
library(AICcmodavg)
```

# Load the Data

Added the data set
```{r load data}
soil <- read.csv("trimmed_metadata.csv") #load the data
```


# Data Collection and Data Wrangling 

## Our Hypothesis: 
```{r}

#Only selected necessary columns that include soil, Site, Date, Type, fungi, bacteria and archaea 
soil_d <- select(soil, Site, Date, Fire, fungi, bacteria, archaea, season)
```

# Initial Inspection



# Mixed Model Testing


# Final Visualization

# Conclusion
